Bash(BASE="/Users/oliverherbelin/Development/Helaia/Codalon/Codalon"
MODULES="CodalonApp CodalonCoreModule CodalonProjectModule CodalonPlanningModule CodalonDashboardModule CodalonGitHubModule CodalonReleaseModule CodalonAppStoreModule CodalonInsightModule CodalonNotificationModule CodalonSettingsModule"

for mod in $MODULES; do
  mkdir -p "$BASE/$mod/Sources" "$BASE/$mod/Tests"
  touch "$BASE/$mod/.gitkeep" "$BASE/$mod/Sources/.gitkeep" "$BASE/$mod/Tests/.gitkeep"
done)
